节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The FastBuffer class is a container type for dealing with binary data directly. It can be constructed in a variety of ways.
This parameter specifies the type of a common encoding format.
TypedArray inherits the features and methods of Int8Array
Allocates a new FastBuffer for a fixed size bytes. If fill is undefined, the FastBuffer will be zero-filled.
注释信息: @param { number } size - size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer
@param { string | FastBuffer | number } [fill] - fill [fill=0] A value to pre-fill the new FastBuffer with
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8']  If `fill` is a string, this is its encoding
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer

parameters.说明: size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8']  If `fill` is a string, this is its encoding

节点.功能描述: Allocates a new FastBuffer for a fixed size bytes. The FastBuffer will not be initially filled.
注释信息: @param { number } size - size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer

parameters.说明: size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer

节点.功能描述: Allocates a new un-pooled FastBuffer for a fixed size bytes. The FastBuffer will not be initially filled.
注释信息: @param { number } size - size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer

parameters.说明: size size The desired length of the new FastBuffer

节点.功能描述: Returns the byte length of a string when encoded using `encoding`. This is not the same as [`String.prototype.length`], which does not account for the encoding that is used to convert the string into bytes.
注释信息: @param { string | FastBuffer | TypedArray | DataView | ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer } value - Target string.
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format of the string. The default value is 'utf8'.
@returns { number } The number of bytes contained within `string`

parameters.类型: string | FastBuffer | TypedArray | DataView | ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer
parameters.说明: Target string.
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - Encoding format of the string. The default value is 'utf8'.

节点.return_description: The number of bytes contained within `string`

节点.功能描述: Returns a new `FastBuffer` which is the result of concatenating all the `FastBuffer`instances in the `list` together. The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer[] | Uint8Array[] } list - list list List of `FastBuffer` or Uint8Array instances to concatenate
@param { number } [totalLength] - totalLength totalLength Total length of the `FastBuffer` instances in `list` when concatenated
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer

parameters.说明: list list List of `FastBuffer` or Uint8Array instances to concatenate
number } [totalLength] - totalLength totalLength Total length of the `FastBuffer` instances in `list` when concatenated

error_codes.description: Range error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Allocates a new FastBuffer using an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255. Array entries outside that range will be truncated to fit into it.
注释信息: @param { number[] } array - array array an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer

parameters.说明: array array an array of bytes in the range 0 – 255

节点.功能描述: This creates a view of the ArrayBuffer without copying the underlying memory. SharedArrayBuffer, for example the .buffer property of a TypedArray. The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { ArrayBuffer | SharedArrayBuffer } arrayBuffer - arrayBuffer arrayBuffer An ArrayBuffer,
@param { number } [byteOffset] - byteOffset [byteOffset = 0] Index of first byte to expose
@param { number } [length] - length [length = arrayBuffer.byteLength - byteOffset] Number of bytes to expose
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a view of the ArrayBuffer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: arrayBuffer arrayBuffer An ArrayBuffer,
number } [length] - length [length = arrayBuffer.byteLength - byteOffset] Number of bytes to expose

节点.return_description: Return a view of the ArrayBuffer

error_codes.description: Range error. Possible causes:
The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Copies the passed buffer data onto a new FastBuffer instance.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } buffer - buffer buffer An existing FastBuffer or Uint8Array from which to copy data
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new allocated FastBuffer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: buffer buffer An existing FastBuffer or Uint8Array from which to copy data

error_codes.description: The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Creates a new FastBuffer containing string. The encoding parameter identifies the character encoding to be used when converting string into bytes.
注释信息: @param { string } value - value string  A string to encode
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The encoding of string
@returns { FastBuffer } Return a new FastBuffer containing string

parameters.说明: value string  A string to encode
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The encoding of string

节点.return_description: Return a new FastBuffer containing string

节点.功能描述: Returns true if obj is a FastBuffer, false otherwise
注释信息: @param { Object } obj - obj obj Objects to be judged

parameters.说明: obj obj Objects to be judged

节点.功能描述: Returns true if encoding is the name of a supported character encoding, or false otherwise.
注释信息: @param { string } encoding - encoding encoding A character encoding name to check

parameters.说明: encoding encoding A character encoding name to check

节点.功能描述: Compares buf1 to buf2 1 is returned if target should come before buf when sorted. -1 is returned if target should come after buf when sorted.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } buf1 - buf1 buf1 A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.
@param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } buf2 - buf2 buf2 A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.
@returns { -1 | 0 | 1 } 0 is returned if target is the same as buf
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: buf1 buf1 A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.
buf2 buf2 A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.

节点.return_description: 0 is returned if target is the same as buf

error_codes.description: The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Re-encodes the given FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance from one character encoding to another.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } source - source source A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.
@param { string } fromEnc - fromEnc fromEnc The current encoding
@param { string } toEnc - toEnc toEnc To target encoding
@returns { FastBuffer } Returns a new FastBuffer instance

parameters.说明: source source A FastBuffer or Uint8Array instance.
fromEnc fromEnc The current encoding
toEnc toEnc To target encoding

节点.功能描述: The FastBuffer object is a method of handling buffers dedicated to binary data.
Returns the number of bytes in buf
The arraybuffer underlying the FastBuffer object
The byteOffset of the Buffers underlying ArrayBuffer object
Fills buf with the specified value. If the offset and end are not given, the entire buf will be filled. The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { string | FastBuffer | Uint8Array | number } value - value value The value with which to fill buf
@param { number } [offset] - offset [offset = 0] Number of bytes to skip before starting to fill buf
@param { number } [end] - end [end = buf.length] Where to stop filling buf (not inclusive)
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The encoding for value if value is a string
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: value value The value with which to fill buf
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The encoding for value if value is a string

error_codes.description: Range error. Possible causes:
The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Compares buf with target and returns a number indicating whether buf comes before, after, or is the same as target in sort order. Comparison is based on the actual sequence of bytes in each FastBuffer. 1 is returned if target should come before buf when sorted. -1 is returned if target should come after buf when sorted. The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } target - target target A FastBuffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf
@param { number } [targetStart] - targetStart [targetStart = 0] The offset within target at which to begin comparison
@param { number } [targetEnd] - targetEnd [targetEnd = target.length] The offset within target at which to end comparison (not inclusive)
@param { number } [sourceStart] - sourceStart [sourceStart = 0] The offset within buf at which to begin comparison
@param { number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to end comparison (not inclusive)
@returns { -1 | 0 | 1 } 0 is returned if target is the same as buf
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: target target A FastBuffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf
number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to end comparison (not inclusive)

节点.return_description: 0 is returned if target is the same as buf

error_codes.description: Range error. Possible causes:
The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Copies data from a region of buf to a region in target, even if the target memory region overlaps with buf. If sourceEnd is greater than the length of the target, the length of the target shall prevail, and the extra part will not be overwritten. The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { FastBuffer | Uint8Array } target - target target A FastBuffer or Uint8Array to copy into
@param { number } [targetStart] - targetStart [targetStart = 0] The offset within target at which to begin writing
@param { number } [sourceStart] - sourceStart [sourceStart = 0] The offset within buf from which to begin copying
@param { number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to stop copying (not inclusive)
@returns { number } The number of bytes copied
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: target target A FastBuffer or Uint8Array to copy into
number } [sourceEnd] - sourceEnd [sourceEnd = buf.length] The offset within buf at which to stop copying (not inclusive)

error_codes.description: Range error. Possible causes:
The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Returns true if both buf and otherBuffer have exactly the same bytes, false otherwise
注释信息: @param { Uint8Array | FastBuffer } otherBuffer - otherBuffer otherBuffer A FastBuffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: otherBuffer otherBuffer A FastBuffer or Uint8Array with which to compare buf

error_codes.description: The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

节点.功能描述: Returns true if value was found in buf, false otherwise
注释信息: @param { string | number | FastBuffer | Uint8Array } value - value value What to search for
@param { number } [byteOffset] - byteOffset [byteOffset = 0] Where to begin searching in buf. If negative, then offset is calculated from the end of buf
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string, this is its encoding

parameters.说明: value value What to search for
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string, this is its encoding

节点.功能描述: The index of the first occurrence of value in buf this is the encoding used to determine the binary representation of the string that will be searched for in buf
注释信息: @param { string | number | FastBuffer | Uint8Array } value - value value What to search for
@param { number } [byteOffset] - byteOffset [byteOffset = 0] Where to begin searching in buf
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string,
@returns { number } The index of the first occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

parameters.说明: value value What to search for
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string,

节点.return_description: The index of the first occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

节点.功能描述: Creates and returns an iterator of buf keys (indices).
Creates and returns an iterator for buf values (bytes).
Creates and returns an iterator of [index, byte] pairs from the contents of buf.
The index of the last occurrence of value in buf this is the encoding used to determine the binary representation of the string that will be searched for in buf
注释信息: @param { string | number | FastBuffer | Uint8Array } value - value value What to search for
@param { number } [byteOffset] - byteOffset [byteOffset = 0] Where to begin searching in buf
@param { BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string,
@returns { number } The index of the last occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

parameters.说明: value value What to search for
BufferEncoding } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] If value is a string,

节点.return_description: The index of the last occurrence of value in buf, or -1 if buf does not contain value

节点.功能描述: Reads a signed, big-endian 64-bit integer from buf at the specified offset
注释信息: @param { number } [offset] - offset [offset = 0] Number of bytes to skip before starting to read. Must satisfy: 0 <= offset <= buf.length - 8
@returns { bigint } Return a signed, big-endian 64-bit integer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "offset" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= buf.length - 8. Received value is: [offset]

parameters.说明: number } [offset] - offset [offset = 0] Number of bytes to skip before starting to read. Must satisfy: 0 <= offset <= buf.length - 8

error_codes.description: The value of "offset" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= buf.length - 8. Received value is: [offset]

@returns { bigint } Return a signed, little-endian 64-bit integer
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "offset" is out of range. It must be >= 0 and <= buf.length - 8. Received value is: [offset]

节点.功能描述: Reads byteLength number of bytes from buf at the specified offset and interprets the result as a big-endian, two's complement signed value supporting up to 48 bits of accuracy
注释信息: @param { number } offset - offset offset Number of bytes to skip before starting to read. Must satisfy: 0 <= offset <= buf.length - byteLength
@param { number } byteLength - byteLength byteLength Number of bytes to read. Must satisfy 0 < byteLength <= 6
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of "[param]" is out of range. It must be >= [left range] and <= [right range]. Received value is: [param]

parameters.说明: offset offset Number of bytes to skip before starting to read. Must satisfy: 0 <= offset <= buf.length - byteLength
byteLength byteLength Number of bytes to read. Must satisfy 0 < byteLength <= 6

error_codes.description: The value of "[param]" is out of range. It must be >= [left range] and <= [right range]. Received value is: [param]

节点.功能描述: Returns a new FastBuffer that references the same memory as the original, but offset and cropped by the start and end indices.

@param { number } [end] - end [end = buf.length] Where the new FastBuffer will end (not inclusive)

parameters.说明: number } [end] - end [end = buf.length] Where the new FastBuffer will end (not inclusive)

节点.功能描述: Interprets buf as an array of unsigned 16-bit integers and swaps the byte order in-place.

节点.功能描述: Writes string to buf at offset according to the character encoding in encoding The value of the parameter is not within the specified range.
注释信息: @param { string } str - str str Writes string to buf at offset according to the character encoding in encoding
@param { number } [offset] - offset [offset = 0] Number of bytes to skip before starting to write string
@param { number } [length] - length [length = buf.length - offset] Maximum number of bytes to write (written bytes will not exceed buf.length - offset)
@param { string } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The character encoding of string.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200068 - The underlying ArrayBuffer is null or detach.

parameters.说明: str str Writes string to buf at offset according to the character encoding in encoding
string } [encoding] - encoding [encoding='utf8'] The character encoding of string.
